creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Yuri,

This is because by default the Xfce terminal uses the F10 key as a shortcut to activate the terminal menu.

It is possible to disable this in the Xfce terminal preferences:
Edit -> Preferences -> Advanced tab -> Disable menu shortcut keys

For more details see here:
http://docs.xfce.org/apps/terminal/preferences

Please let me know if you need any other help with this. I will mark the bug as closed in the mean time, assuming this has helped.

Good luck,
Ben
